name: content-brief
description: Generates a fully structured SEO content brief for a target keyword and optionally pushes it to a Notion database. Use this skill whenever the user says 'create a content brief', 'brief this keyword', 'run a content brief for', 'generate a brief', 'write a brief for [keyword]', 'content brief on [topic]', or any variation where someone needs a keyword researched and turned into a structured writing assignment with H1, H2 outline, FAQ, internal links, word count target, and writer notes. author: Infrasity-Labs
